sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79776" key="paroriste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρορ-ιστέον</orth>, <sense id="n79776.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must set a limit</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
